title: CobbleBlocks - Cobblemon
description: This addon introduces normal minecraft blocks as Fakemon for the Cobblemon mod
body:
This is an Add-On to the mod [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)

You need to download both the datapack and the resourcepack in order for it to work.


# CobbleBlocks

The goal of this datapack is make minecraft blocks come to life for you to capture and battle with.

All models and animations are made by Kepsin, while the textures are being used are from the [Faithful](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-64x) resouce pack with some modification to make them fit on the models. Other assets are from following the cobblemon creation [tutorial](https://cobblemon.com/guides/custompokemon) but modified by Kepsin.

### Fakemon List

* Sand 
* Sandstone
* Cobblestone 
* Stone 
* Stonebricks
* Log 
* Planks 
* Dirt
* Grass
* Podzol
* Mycelum

### Evolution Methods

* Cobblestone -> Stone: Have Cobblestone interact w/ a furnace
* Stone -> Stonebricks: Have Stone interact w/ a stonecutter
* Log -> Planks: Have Log interact w/ crafting table
* Sand -> Sandstone: Sand must learn Harden
* Dirt -> Grass: Lvl 25 holding Grass
* Dirt -> Podzol: Lvl 25 holding Dead Bush
* Dirt -> Mycelium: Lvl 25 holding Red Mushroom
